settings.heading: Questions? We've got you.
settings.contact_sub: We're a small team but we read everything.

settings.question: What age are your toys designed for?
settings.answer: Most of our wooden gear walls and STEM sets are designed for ages 18 months through 6 years. Each product page lists the recommended age range and developmental stage so you can find the right fit.

settings.question: Are your products safe for toddlers?
settings.answer: Yes. Every OFST product is made from sustainably sourced hardwood with non-toxic, water-based finishes. All products meet or exceed ASTM F963 and EN71 toy safety standards. We test every new design before it ships.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: We ship from our Michigan workshop. Standard shipping is 3–7 business days. Expedited options are available at checkout. Custom and engraved orders add 2–4 business days.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery for unused items in original packaging. If something arrives damaged, just send us a photo and we'll sort it out right away — no shipping the item back.

settings.question: Can I get a gear wall customized?
settings.answer: Yes! We offer name engraving and custom color combinations on select gear walls. Choose the 'Customize' option on the product page, or email us directly for larger custom orders.

settings.question: Do you offer wholesale or bulk pricing?
settings.answer: We work with small boutiques, children's museums, and schools. Email wholesale@ourfirststeps.com with your business info and we'll get back to you within 2 business days.

settings.question: What's the difference between your gear wall sizes?
settings.answer: The Mini (12"×12") fits on a door or small wall — great for apartments. The Standard (18"×24") is our most popular and fits 6–8 gears. The Studio (24"×36") is for serious gear enthusiasts and fills a full wall section.

settings.question: Are the resources really free?
settings.answer: Yes, completely free — no email required for most of them. We made these because we needed them and figured other parents might too. A few have an optional email signup if you want updates when we add new ones.
